evidence_items.claim: Cloudflare presents a Trust Hub page describing trust-related policies, technologies, and certifications.
evidence_items.supporting_text: The Cloudflare Trust Hub. Policies, technologies, and certifications that help us earn customer trust

evidence_items.claim: Cloudflare states that it respects personal data transiting its network.
evidence_items.supporting_text: We earn our users’ trust by respecting the sanctity of personal data transiting our network

evidence_items.claim: Cloudflare states that it is transparent about how it handles and secures data.
evidence_items.supporting_text: by being transparent about how we handle and secure that data

evidence_items.claim: Cloudflare references third-party certifications as part of its Trust Hub content.
evidence_items.supporting_text: Read on to explore the policies, technologies, and third-party certifications that make this trust possible.

evidence_items.claim: Cloudflare states that it builds data privacy into its work and references privacy policy, data localization products, and GDPR-related regulations.
evidence_items.supporting_text: Cloudflare builds data privacy into everything we do. Learn about our privacy policy, our data localization products, and our approach to regulations like the GDPR.

limitations: Only visible above-the-fold page text was reviewed.
No links were clicked and no linked evidence pages were visited.
The page indicates additional content below the visible area, but it was not reviewed because visible text was sufficient to produce evidence.
No final vendor risk decision is provided.
